rows.label: tev091401_JNK0010
rows.name: Inquire

rows.label: tev091401_SEL0011
rows.name: Ask Baal about NLA's outer wall.

rows.label: tev091401_JNK0020
rows.name: Discuss

rows.label: tev091401_SEL0021
rows.name: Ask Baal about recent developments.

rows.label: tev091401_SEL0031
rows.name:
Ask Baal about damage
to NLA's outer wall.

rows.label: tev091401_SEL0051
rows.name: Ask Baal about NLA's outer wall.

rows.label: tev091401_MSG0001
rows.name:
The outer wall of NLA also served
as the hull of the White Whale.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev091401_MSG0002
rows.name:
Essential parts of the city's
power and communications grids
are embedded inside it.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev091401_MSG0003
rows.name:
So if it were to be destroyed, of course
we'd have to worry all kinds of outside
enemies infiltrating the city.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev091401_MSG0004
rows.name:
But the bigger problem is that
NLA's core functionality as a city
would be in danger of collapse![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev091401_MSG0005
rows.name:
I'm not going to let Lin beat me when it comes to
keeping the wall both inspected and maintained, so
I hope you'll do your part to keep it protected.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev091401_MSG0010
rows.name:
The other day, Lin and I had a great
brainstorming session about the way
energy is supplied to NLA.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev091401_MSG0011
rows.name:
One of the ideas that stuck out for me was
using the lava from Molten Hollow to the
north as a source of geothermal power.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev091401_MSG0012
rows.name:
I've asked command to let me research
the feasibility of the idea.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev091401_MSG0013
rows.name:
Now don't get me wrong—I'm sure
Lin is a hell of a BLADE when it
comes to combat and the like...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev091401_MSG0014
rows.name:
But she has such interesting ideas!
I wish she could just work as a
mechanic here with me every day.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev091401_MSG0019
rows.name:
We took a lot of hits from the
Growth's artillery, but the walls
were barely damaged at all.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev091401_MSG0020
rows.name:
Remember, that wall was the hull of the White
Whale— it was built to resist space debris even
when traveling at faster-than-light speeds.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev091401_MSG0021
rows.name:
Don't get me wrong—I was
terrified to see our enemies
infiltrate as far as they did.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev091401_MSG0022
rows.name:
But I knew that between you BLADEs and this
wall that was left to us by the builders of
the White Whale, the battle was ours to lose.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev091401_MSG0027
rows.name:
I was researching who it was that designed
the hull of the White Whale so that it could
shrug off even the Growth's artillery...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev091401_MSG0028
rows.name:
And guess what I found? The
names of Lin's parents were
listed among its architects![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev091401_MSG0029
rows.name:
I heard that they'd died in an accident
during the testing of the main engine.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev091401_MSG0030
rows.name:
And yet, in a way, they're still
protecting Lin and the rest of us today.[ST:wait ]
